summary: Iteration 8 — full interactive validation of PageEditor layout prototype v2 (PageRail w/ Blocks+Pages tabs; BlockEditorDrawer moved to LEFT of preview; EmptyBlockEditor placeholder; footer action mirrors active tab). Ran 14 targeted Playwright assertions against /edit/page/pg_2f793530a12a with the pre-minted session cookie. All 14 passed. Key geometric checks confirmed: rail=w-256 expanded / w-64 collapsed, drawer.x=256 sits flush against rail (rail.end=256), preview.x=664 — drawer is cleanly between rail and preview as intended. Tabs, count badges (Blocks=6, Pages=2), footer swap (Add block ↔ New page), PageTemplatePicker open/close, BlockAdder modal with all 3 tabs, drag-to-reorder, trash-icon delete, collapse toggle (w-256→w-64) with block selection from collapsed state all behave correctly. page-name-input autosave, copy-page-snippet-button, save-as-template-button all fire without crashes.

issues: PageRail collapsed width is 64px (w-16); iter6 brief said 60px — cosmetic 4px diff, carried over from prior iterations. Non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: PageRail.jsx (563 lines) is approaching the 700-line soft cap. Pre-refactor, BlocksList/BlockRow/CollapsedBlockIcon/PagesList subcomponents could each live in separate files under /pages/page-editor/rail/ — would also make future A/B tweaks safer.

PageRail pages refresh effect at lines 75-78 fires api.listPages().then(setPages) unconditionally whenever activePageId changes — no cancelled-guard on the setPages call. Minor race risk if user navigates rapidly between pages; harmless in practice but inconsistent with the guarded initial effect (lines 61-71).

EmptyBlockEditor lives inside PageEditor.jsx (line 351) while BlockEditorDrawer is already extracted. For symmetry and discoverability, EmptyBlockEditor should be extracted to /pages/page-editor/EmptyBlockEditor.jsx next to the drawer.

Save-as-template uses a native window.prompt (verified by playwright dialog hook firing). Inconsistent with the shadcn/Sonner UX used elsewhere — should migrate to a proper Dialog for accessibility + keyboard nav parity.

BlockAdder and PageTemplatePicker both dismiss only on backdrop click; Escape key does not close either modal. Common UX regression pattern — add an onKeyDown / useEffect keydown listener for 'Escape' on both.

seed_data_creation: Testing page (pg_2f793530a12a) had one block removed by the delete-via-trash test (went from 6 → 5 blocks). Also had one pair of block positions swapped by the reorder test (first two blocks). These side-effects are acceptable per the test brief (interactive validation) but main agent may want to re-seed the page to 6 blocks if the iter9 brief expects the original count.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 feature bullets from the iter8 review request are validated green. PageRail collapsed width, Esc-to-close on BlockAdder/PageTemplatePicker, and EmptyBlockEditor extraction are the only open soft-feedback items. Next iteration should hit /edit/page/pg_2f793530a12a with exactly 5 blocks now (not 6) due to this iteration's delete test — seed data warning noted. Session token above may expire; re-fetch via the recipe in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
